title: Bike valet
details: Friday, June 19: 12:00 p.m. to 8:00 p.m. at the Duluth Entertainment Convention Center (DECC), near Entrance A.
Saturday, June 20: 6:30 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. at the corner of Buchanan Street and Lake Avenue.
The bike valet works like a coat check: bikes are tagged and riders receive a claim stub.

title: Ride the bus / DTA
details: Participants can ride the Duluth Transit Authority (DTA) for free on race day by showing an official race bib.
Use the DTA Trip Planner to plan weekend activities.

title: Port Town Trolley
details: Courtesy of the Duluth Transit Authority, the Port Town Trolley is available from 8:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. on race day between Canal Park at Lake Avenue and Morse Street and Bayfront Festival Park.

title: Skywalk access
details: Use the indoor skywalk system to cross Interstate 35 and access the DECC.
Enter the skywalk in downtown Duluth at the Holiday Center, 207 W. Superior Street.

title: Lakewalk
details: For a less congested option between the finish line area and Miles 19–24, consider using Duluth’s Lakewalk.
Bikes are allowed on the Lakewalk, but they are not allowed on the racecourse.
